lore.english:
The leader of all Taimanins, a group of ninjas who fight for justice. Serves as the head-mistress of Gosha Academy, the educational institute for Taimanins.

Utilizes master swordsmanship and super-human physical capabilities, in addition to her ninja art that allows her to move at a speed beyond human perception. She has awakened her true power during a certain mission. Her weapon of choice is a ninja katana.

User of [FFFF00FF]Hawk Art[-], a supernatural ninja art. Heightens her senses and physical capabilities for one second, allowing her to move as if six seconds have passed. She perceives the world in slow motion while using her ninja art; others perceive her as moving at the speed of light. Since her ninja art greatly exhausts her, she cannot use it multiple times at once.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&SPD] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase SPD of Power allies by 7.5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase SPD of Power allies by 7.5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taimanin Art: Hawk Slash[-]
skills.description:
Swings the sword horizontally and slashes the enemy.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKSPD]
skills.description_readable: Swings the sword horizontally and slashes the enemy.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Hirenka[-]
skills.description:
After kicking the enemy upward, slashes them 4 times in midair for a total of 5 attacks.
If the target slashed has below [&Color_Cyan]50%[-] [&HP], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:10202]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:10202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:10202] turn(s)
[&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases in proportion to SPD.
skills.description_readable:
After kicking the enemy upward, slashes them 4 times in midair for a total of 5 attacks.
If the target slashed has below 50% HP, inflicts (75%) Heal Reduction at a 99% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
CRIT Rate increases in proportion to SPD.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Koujin Zanka[-]
skills.description:
Moves as fast as light and instantly attacks the enemy [A:103] times.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKSPD]
Gains a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:10303]%)[-] [&AtkUp] and [&Color_Cyan]([V3:10302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:10303] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Moves as fast as light and instantly attacks the enemy [A:103] times.

Gains a (40%) ATK UP and (19.5%) before the attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Almighty Taimanin[-]
skills.description: Each time the character gains a [&Buff], the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills [&Color_Cyan]([V3:10401]%)[-] at a fixed [&Color_Cyan][R:10401]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable: Each time the character gains a Buff, the Turn Gauge fills (20%) at a fixed -20% chance.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_101]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_103]
skill_data.description:
Moves as fast as light and instantly attacks the enemy [A:113] time(s).
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:11302]%)[-] [&SpdDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:11302]%[-] chance and has their [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] reduced by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:11303]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:11303]%[-] chance on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast].
skill_data.description_readable:
Moves as fast as light and instantly attacks the enemy [A:113] time(s).
Target hit is inflicted with (-19.5%) SPD DOWN at a 99% chance and has their Turn Gauge reduced by (15%) at a 65% chance on Last Attack.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_102]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_102]
skill_data.description:
After kicking the enemy upward, slashes them 4 times in midair for a total of 5 attacks.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:11202]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:11202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:11202] turn(s)
Killing an enmey with this skill resets the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_103].
skill_data.description_readable:
After kicking the enemy upward, slashes them 4 times in midair for a total of 5 attacks.
Target hit is inflicted with (65%) Heal Reduction at a 99% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
Killing an enmey with this skill resets the Cooldown of Koujin Zanka.
